meaning: n.(中美产的)一种树胶(本身无味,用制口香糖等)
examples: It occurred to him to add flavoring4 to the chicle.
Thomas Adams began experimenting with chicle as a substitute for rubber3, but he failed.
What Happened: he was experimenting with chicle, the SAP from a South American tree, as a substitute for rubber.
Mayans chewed on the sap of the sapodilla tree and called it chicle.
Locals have been extracting the natural chicle gum base from the bark of the chicozapote trees for a century, a spokesman for Chicza told CNN.
